name: Gmail AI Auto-Responder with Slack Review
description: Fetches unread Gmail emails, uses Claude AI to assess each email and draft contextually appropriate replies, then posts the drafted replies to Slack with Block Kit formatting for human review before sending.

source.originalName: Gmail AI Auto-Responder: Create Draft Replies to incoming emails

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for reading unread emails

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting draft review

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post drafted replies for review

senderName.description: Your name to use in reply signatures

replyTone.description: Tone for replies: professional, friendly, formal, casual

maxEmails.description: Maximum number of unread emails to process

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for draft replies
Run Claude AI to draft replies
Build Slack Block Kit with drafted replies
Post drafted replies to Slack for review
